steps.title: Use the physical action
steps.content: Mrs. Wilkins stays where she is and reaches across to a bowl of oranges so she can take one and offer one to Rose. The phrase describes extending her body or arm toward the bowl.

steps.title: Choose the nearest meaning
steps.content: Choice A means uniting with someone. Choice B means catching up to something. Choice D means getting to a destination. In context, the action is extending toward the oranges. The answer is C.
